title: Rear Window
synopsis: A photographer recovering from an injury becomes convinced that one of his neighbors has committed murder.

title: Before Sunrise
synopsis: Two strangers meet on a train and spend one night walking through Vienna, talking as if time has paused for them.

title: The Apartment
synopsis: An office worker lends his apartment to executives and slowly discovers the emotional cost of getting ahead.

title: Moonstruck
synopsis: A practical widow agrees to marry one brother, then falls into a wildly inconvenient romance with the other.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
synopsis: A legendary concierge and his lobby boy become entangled in art theft, family intrigue, and a vanishing world.

title: In the Mood for Love
synopsis: Two neighbors in 1960s Hong Kong discover their spouses are having an affair and form a restrained, aching bond.

title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three
synopsis: A New York transit cop negotiates with hijackers who have taken a subway car hostage below the city.
